items.t: — the Cartier owner's quarter to June 30; Americas +27%, the watch division back to growth at +8%
— 22 charged in a $10.65M smuggling ring; PNJ's ex-lab chief accused of re-papering smuggled stones with the lab's own certificates
— first-half sales; public auctions +71%, private sales a record $826M, younger buyers' watch spend +60% to $129,000
— the CPI rally pauses on day four of US airstrikes on Iranian sites; silver eases to 57.61
— pre-owned heat builds 3.5× faster than any tracked brand in June per Chrono24; all 13 brands now positive over six months
— Stile Libero lands: 65 pieces, a 99-sapphire mandala, 20.15 carats of pear Paraíbas on one choker
— the Cape Coral through-the-wall suspect joins the wanted list; three co-defendants in custody over the $1M Tio Jewelers heist
— the New York symbol-jewelry house opens its first store abroad on Mount Street, Mayfair
— the no-buyer's-premium online sale closes today, July 16
